title: Update podman-remote run and start to handle detach keys
body: As described in the issue #7979, `podman-remote run` and `podman-remote start --attach` currently do not handle detach keys. This PR fixes the issue by handling the detach keys and exit cleanly with status 0.

comments.body: Any chance of tests for this?

Thanks, @andylibrian.
I can confirm this fixes my issue.
I can't seem to find existing tests that send detach keys. I attempted to write a test that send the keys but `ErrDetach` wasn't returned. Any pointer or advice would be great.

I thought we could inspect this data, but turns out that these fields should not be supported in podman create and are not stored in the database.  Making this a lot more difficult to test.

I opened a PR to fix my misunderstanding.
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/8053

/approve
/lgtm
